lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Outfitting planner used to verify the weapon layout, shield and hull-reinforcement fit, power budget and boost speed.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Cobra Mk IV ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative hardpoint layout (2 Medium · 3 Small · 2 Utility), core slot sizes and hull mass used for the loadout tables.

sources.label: Inara — Cobra Mk IV
sources.what: Stock hull price, small-pad requirement, and module-seller reference for outfitting the combat fit.

sources.label: Fandom — Cobra Mk IV
sources.what: Manufacturer (Faulcon DeLacy), Horizons availability, role profile, and lore reference for the combat assessment.
